2606.15642.title: CIWI-CKT: Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion and Cross-City Knowledge Transfer for Traffic Flow Forecasting
2606.15642.paper_summary: Accurate traffic flow prediction remains challenging in cross-city, data-scarce scenarios where limited historical data hinders model generalisation. The chaotic nature of traffic dynamics, complex spatio-temporal dependencies, and heterogeneous urban networks complicate few-shot learning across cities. Existing deep learning approaches either treat traffic as purely deterministic or lack mechanisms to model wave-like interference patterns essential for cross-regime traffic dynamics. To address these limitations, this paper proposes CIWI-CKT, a novel Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion framework with Cross-City Knowledge Transfer. Our framework introduces three core innovations: chaos-informed wave generation that extracts measurable chaos invariants and models traffic as adaptive wave components; meta-interference processing that captures wave interactions between support and query regimes while producing a predictability score for confidence estimation; and chaos-aware meta-learning that enables efficient cross-city knowledge transfer while preserving chaotic characteristics. We establish theoretical guarantees including chaos-to-wave stability, wave-induced dimension reduction, and meta-learning generalisation bounds. Extensive experiments on four real-world traffic datasets demonstrate that CIWI-CKT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art spatio-temporal graph learning, transfer learning, prompt-based, and few-shot methods, improving prediction accuracy while substantially reducing required training data.
2606.15642.paper_summary_zh: 準確的交通流量預測在跨城市、數據稀缺的情境中仍然具有挑戰性，因為有限的歷史數據妨礙了模型的泛化。交通動態的混沌特性、複雜的時空依賴性以及異質的城市網絡使得跨城市的少量學習變得更加複雜。現有的深度學習方法要麼將交通視為純粹的確定性，要麼缺乏建模波動干擾模式的機制，而這些模式對於跨範疇的交通動態至關重要。為了解決這些限制，本文提出了CIWI-CKT，一種新穎的混沌信息波干擾特徵融合框架，並具備跨城市知識轉移。我們的框架引入了三個核心創新：混沌信息波生成，提取可測量的混沌不變量並將交通建模為自適應波組件；元干擾處理，捕捉支持和查詢範疇之間的波互動，同時生成用於信心估計的可預測性分數；以及混沌感知元學習，使得高效的跨城市知識轉移成為可能，同時保留混沌特徵。我們建立了理論保證，包括混沌到波的穩定性、波引起的維度降低以及元學習的泛化界限。在四個真實世界交通數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，CIWI-CKT顯著超越了最先進的時空圖學習、轉移學習、基於提示的方法和少量學習方法，提高了預測準確性，同時大幅減少了所需的訓練數據。
2606.15642.author: Abdul Joseph Fofanah et.al.
2606.15642.authors: Abdul Joseph Fofanah, Lian Wen, David Chen, Shaoyang Zhang
